p2p_enrich.notes: Added 3 new repo_tests CI commands as pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_snap_installs - yarn install --frozen-lockfile in compiler directory; (2) test_snap_prettier_check - yarn prettier --check packages/snap/src/**/*.ts; (3) Fixed existing tests: test_snap_typescript_compiles now uses 'yarn workspace snap tsc --noEmit' from compiler directory, test_snap_builds uses 'yarn workspace snap build' from compiler directory. All 5 p2p tests pass on base commit. Repo: facebook/react PR 35537, modified files in compiler/packages/snap/src: constants.ts, fixture-utils.ts, runner.ts, runner-watch.ts.

validate.notes: All validations passed. Docker build succeeded. NOP test correctly returned 0 (7 fail-to-pass tests failed as expected on buggy base). Gold test returned 1 (12/12 tests passed). Rubric judge ICR=1.0 (4/4 rules passed). Fixed: 1) Removed code-file rubric rules (judge only evaluates config files), 2) Added reference content to rubric rules, 3) Increased truncation limit in judge.py from 500 to 5000 chars so LLM can see full CLAUDE.md content.
